exampleSentences: Ai đang gọi điện cho anh vào lúc này vậy?
Chị không biết ai đã để quên chiếc ô trên bàn.
Nếu em không biết ai là giáo viên mới, anh sẽ giới thiệu.
notes:
Ai means who. It’s used to ask about a person’s identity.

It’s a question word, usually at the start of the clause, but it can also stay in the subject position.  

It also appears in fixed combos: ai cũng = everyone, không ai = no one, ai đó = someone. These are super useful and very common.

Unlike English, you don’t change the word for subject/object — ai stays the same.
notes_md:
**Ai** means **who**. It’s used to ask about a person’s identity.

It’s a question word, usually at the start of the clause, but it can also stay in the subject position.  

It also appears in fixed combos: **ai cũng** = everyone, **không ai** = no one, **ai đó** = someone. These are super useful and very common.

Unlike English, you don’t change the word for subject/object — **ai** stays the same.

example.vi: Ai là người đã giúp bạn?

definitions.en: Used to ask about a person or people.
definitions.vi: Dùng để hỏi về một người hoặc nhiều người.
definitions.es: Se utiliza para preguntar sobre una persona o personas.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Who is calling you at this time?
She doesn't know who left the umbrella on the table.
If you don't know who the new teacher is, I will introduce you.
